prompt: A straight-out-of-camera close portrait photo of an adult red-haired woman facing the camera in a plain agency casting-photo style. Frame as a tight head-and-shoulders portrait, slightly below the collarbone, with the face centered and filling most of the image. She has long loose copper red hair, slightly messy and natural with flyaway strands, parted loosely off center and falling over both shoulders. Her skin is fair with visible freckles, mild redness, pores, fine lines, and natural under-eye texture; no makeup or only barely visible makeup. Expression is neutral, calm, and unsmiling, lips relaxed, eyes looking directly into the lens. She wears a worn dark charcoal gray crew-neck T-shirt with soft folds and a slightly stretched neckline. Background is a simple pale off-white wall in daylight, with no props or decoration. Use soft window light from the front-left, realistic portrait-lens compression, shallow restrained depth of field with the eye plane sharp and ears and shoulders gently falling off, faint digital grain, slight edge softness, mild cool-green room color cast, imperfect white balance, and natural uneven skin tones. Make it feel physically present, documentary, unsmoothed, unretouched, and believable, like a raw casting test file rather than a polished studio portrait.
